creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-01-09 21:11:19 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/p5-SCGI          Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  This Perl module is for implementing the SCGI interface for an application
  server.  Essentially, it is a 'next generation' FastCGI type protocol.
  
  WWW: http://python.ca/nas/scgi/protocol.txt
  
  PR:             ports/107710
  Submitted by:   Vivek Khera <vivek at khera.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1677    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +31 -0     ports/www/p5-SCGI/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/p5-SCGI/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/www/p5-SCGI/pkg-descr (new)
